zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles Daubeney於大約1335年出生時，他的父親Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny32歲，母親Alice Montacute25歲。他於1359年1月5日與Lady Alainore de Willington結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1379年被列為sheriff of bedford & buckingham。他去世於1386年6月24日在英國薩默塞特巴林頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles Daubeney于大约1335年出生时，他的父亲Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny32岁，母亲Alice Montacute25岁。他于1359年1月5日与Lady Alainore de Willington结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1379年被列为sheriff of bedford & buckingham。他去世于1386年6月24日在英国薩默塞特巴林頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Daubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Daubeney was born about 1335, his father, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, was 32 and his mother, Alice Montacute, was 25. He married Lady Alainore de Willington on 5 January 1359. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. In 1379, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as sheriff of bedford & buckingham. He died on 24 June 1386, in Barrington, Somerset, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Barrington, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles Daubeney est né environ 1335, son père, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Montacute, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alainore de Willington le 5 janvier 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. En 1379, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of bedford & buckingham. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1386, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giles Daubeney um 1335 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny 32 und seine Mutter Alice Montacute 25. Er hat am 5. Januar 1359 Lady Alainore de Willington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1379, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of bedford & buckingham aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Juni 1386 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Barrington, Somerset, England und wurde in Barrington, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Daubeney è nato il circa 1335, il suo padre, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Montacute, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alainore de Willington il 5 gennaio 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1379, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of bedford & buckingham. Morì il 24 giugno 1386, nel Barrington, Somerset, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Barrington, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Daubeneyが約1335年に生まれた時，父Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubenyは32歳，母Alice Montacuteは25歳であった。1359年1月5日にLady Alainore de Willingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1379年，45歳の時，職業はsheriff of bedford & buckinghamと記録されている。彼は1386年6月24日にイギリスソメルセトバーリントンで52歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Daubeney(이)가 대략 1335년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Montacute(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1359년 1월 5일 Lady Alainore de Willington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1379년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of bedford & buckingham이었다. 그는 1386년 6월 24일 영국 서머세트 배링턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 배링턴에 묻혔다.

mn.South Petherton, Somerset, England: South Petherton, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles Daubeney nasceu aproximadamente 1335, seu pai, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montacute, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alainore de Willington em 5 de janeiro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1379, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of bedford & buckingham. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1386, em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Daubeney родился около 1335 г., его отцу по имени Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Montacute, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alainore de Willington 5 января 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1379 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of bedford & buckingham. Он умер 24 июня 1386 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles Daubeney nació aproximadamente 1335, su papá, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Montacute, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Alainore de Willington el 5 de enero de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1379, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of bedford & buckingham. Murió el 24 de junio de 1386, en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra.
